languages.text: "Даже здесь, вдали от скверны бюрократии и амбиций, кровные узы ставят выше законных рангов. Похоже, эта ересь у Человечества в крови".

traits.locale_text: "Даже здесь, вдали от скверны бюрократии и амбиций, кровыне узы ставят выше законных рангов. Похоже, эта ересь у Человечества в крови".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
languages.original_text: "Даже здесь, вдали от скверны бюрократии и амбиций, кровные узы ставят выше законных рангов. Похоже, эта ересь у Человечества в крови".

traits.locale_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful ranks. It seems this heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
"Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful ranks. It seems this heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
"Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
"Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."
"Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

languages.text: «Incluso aquí, lejos de la inmundicia de la burocracia y la ambición, los lazos de sangre tienen preferencia con respecto al rango legal. Parece que esta herejía es algo intrínseco a la Humanidad».
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: «Incluso aquí, lejos de la inmundicia de la burocracia y la ambición, los lazos de sangre tienen preferencia con respecto al rango legal. Parece que esta herejía es algo intrínseco a la Humanidad».

languages.text: “即便在此处，远离了那官僚体制与野心的污浊，血缘纽带仍被置于法定的军阶之上。看来，这种特殊的异端思想，就流淌在人类的天性之中。”
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: “即便在此处，远离了那官僚体制与野心的污浊，血缘纽带仍被置于法定的军阶之上。看来，这种特殊的异端思想，就流淌在人类的天性之中。”

languages.text: « Même ici, loin de l'engeance bureaucratique et des ambitions, les liens du sang valent plus que la hiérarchie encadrée par la loi. Il semble que cette hérésie particulière soit bien ancrée dans la nature humaine. »
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: « Même ici, loin de l'engeance bureaucratique et des ambitions, les liens du sang valent plus que la hiérarchie encadrée par la loi. Il semble que cette hérésie particulière soit bien ancrée dans la nature humaine. »

languages.text: "Bürokrasinin ve hırsın pisliğinden uzak olan burada bile kan bağları, meşru mevkinin üstünde tutuluyor. Görünüşe göre bu özel kâfirlik, İnsanlığın kanında var."
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: "Bürokrasinin ve hırsın pisliğinden uzak olan burada bile kan bağları, meşru mevkinin üstünde tutuluyor. Görünüşe göre bu özel kâfirlik, İnsanlığın kanında var."

languages.text: "Selbst hier, fern vom Sumpf der Bürokratie und Ambitionen, stehen Blutbande über dem gesetzlichen Rang. Insbesondere diese Ketzerei scheint den Menschen im Blut zu liegen."
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: "Selbst hier, fern vom Sumpf der Bürokratie und Ambitionen, stehen Blutbande über dem gesetzlichen Rang. Insbesondere diese Ketzerei scheint den Menschen im Blut zu liegen."

languages.text: 「官僚主義や野心といった汚いものから遠く離れたこの地でも、血縁は法的な地位よりも優先される。この特定の異端は、人類の血に流れているようだ。」
languages.original_text: "Even here, far from the filth of bureaucracy and ambition, blood ties are placed above lawful rank. It seems this particular heresy runs in Humanity's very blood."

traits.locale_text: 「官僚主義や野心といった汚いものから遠く離れたこの地でも、血縁は法的な地位よりも優先される。この特定の異端は、人類の血に流れているようだ。」
